citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 10:01 AM on May
13, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by phone and text message. The licensee messaged back that
they were were not available to accompany the APHIS official for inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility,
animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is
serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 10:01 AM on May 
13, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by phone and text message. The licensee messaged back that 
they were were not available to accompany the APHIS official for inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility, 
animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is 
serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
